name: Bank of Vici
description_short: Community bank serving Vici, Oklahoma since 1902, offering personal and business banking services including loans, online banking, and debit cards.
description_long: Bank of Vici is a longstanding community bank with over 120 years of history, having been chartered on October 22, 1902. The institution has survived major economic events including the 1907 money panic, the 1929 market breakdown, the 1933 bank moratorium, multiple wars, and the oil and gas industry cycles. Currently led by President and CEO David G Trimble, the bank has grown from $230,000 in assets at its 1927 milestone to over $22 million in total assets by its 100th anniversary in 2002. Bank of Vici offers a range of standard banking services including personal and business enrollment in digital banking, online banking with 24/7 customer support, loan payment processing, loan origination, debit cards with design customization options, mobile banking, and a night depository service. The bank provides loan calculators and maintains both lobby and drive-in access during business hours. Their digital banking platform allows customers to send secured emails for account inquiries and access online services remotely. What distinguishes Bank of Vici is its deeply rooted community commitment and local focus. The bank explicitly states it strives to serve farmers, ranchers, and business people of the community and has maintained a philosophy of giving back to the community since its founding, including support for school activities and civic affairs. As a small, independently-operated community bank, it operates with a personal touch rather than as part of a national chain. The bank operates with limited hours (Monday-Friday 9 AM-3 PM only, closed Saturdays) and maintains a single physical location in Vici, Oklahoma. While it offers modern digital banking capabilities, its reach and service availability are geographically restricted to the local community. Prospective customers outside the Vici area should verify account accessibility before opening.
services: Secured email communication for account inquiries
pros: 24/7 customer support for online banking inquiries and issues
Over 120 years of operational history and community stability since 1902
Customizable debit card design options for personalization
Mobile banking and online banking platforms for remote account access
Secure email messaging through online banking for sensitive account questions
Night depository service for after-hours deposits
Active community involvement with documented civic and school support
cons: Single branch location limits accessibility to Vici, Oklahoma area only
Limited lobby and drive-in hours (Monday-Friday 9 AM-3 PM, closed Saturdays)
Small institution with limited assets may restrict loan amounts or product variety compared to larger banks
Website provides minimal detail on account types, interest rates, fees, or specific loan products
best_for: Local residents and business owners in Vici, Oklahoma seeking personalized community banking
Farmers and ranchers in the region needing relationship-based banking services
Customers prioritizing local institution support and community involvement over national bank convenience
diagnosis: Bank of Vici is best for individuals and businesses already located in or serving the Vici, Oklahoma area who value local banking relationships and community involvement. The primary caveat is geographic limitation—this is a single-branch community bank with no online account opening or service for customers outside the Vici region, and the institution does not publicly disclose product details, rates, or fees on its website.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
